# PERF-74 positive: db.Find inside handler with no Select clause
lang: go
file: PERF-074-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Name string
}

func ListUsers(c echo.Context, db *gorm.DB) error {
	var users []User
	db.Find(&users)
	return c.String(200, "ok")
}
